subtitles.original: 紡いでたら「一途」に変ったよ
subtitles.english: When I spun them together, they turned into devotion.

subtitles.original: あたりさわりない言葉じゃ
覆いきれないほどのマイワールド
subtitles.english: I can't fully cover my own world.

subtitles.original: 明日で呼ぶ声の持ち主は
subtitles.english: The owner of the voice calling in tomorrow...

subtitles.original: 他でもないこの心だった
subtitles.english: ...was none other than this heart of mine.

subtitles.original: 見えないって言っている その言葉も
subtitles.english: Even those words saying "I can't see"

subtitles.original: 「言葉」だと足りないだけ
subtitles.english: are just not enough as mere "words."

subtitles.original: 掴んだもの 落としたもの
subtitles.english: The things I grabbed, the things I dropped,

subtitles.original: 転んだって立って見えた視界から
subtitles.english: from the scenery I saw as I fell and stood up again,

subtitles.original: ロックユー！解き放って
ロックユー！解き放って
フォーユー！響きだして
フォーユー！響きだして
景色変えてゆく
まだ遠く遠くまで広がった空に
subtitles.english: To the sky that stretches far, far away,

subtitles.original: やっと踏み出すこの一歩なんてちっぽけだけど
subtitles.english: this first step I'm finally taking is tiny, but...

subtitles.original: 届かない場所へと続いていく保存
どんな風に雨に消えない
subtitles.english: No matter the wind or rain, it won't fade...

subtitles.original: 白線を描く
もっと高く高くまで羽ばたいていたい
subtitles.english: I want to flap my wings higher and higher.

subtitles.original: そして彼方色で繋ぐ
地平で待ってて
もう願いに嘘はない
subtitles.english: There are no more lies in my wishes.

subtitles.original: ここが好き！
どんな世界も瞬間も輝く
subtitles.english: Every world and every moment shines...

subtitles.original: アイが在るから
今はただ想うこと言えばいい
subtitles.english: Now, I just need to say what I feel:

subtitles.original: 「愛しているよ！」
澄み渡った空に白線
subtitles.english: A white line in the clear sky,

subtitles.original: 不安と期待がアンビバレント
でも「君」はもう気づいてる保存
もっと高く高く高く飛んでいける
subtitles.english: I can fly higher, higher, and higher!

subtitles.original: もっと
もっと
もっと
もっと
鏡よ 教えて
私の証はどこにあるのだろう
subtitles.english: where is my proof of existence?

subtitles.original: わからない わからないよ
subtitles.english: I don't know, I don't know.

subtitles.original: 周りと比べたってさ
subtitles.english: Even if I compare myself to others,

subtitles.original: 虚しくなるだけ
subtitles.english: it only makes me feel empty.

subtitles.original: あのノイズが
海鳴りのように涙を奪う
subtitles.english: ...takes away my tears like the roaring of the sea.

subtitles.original: 切り取った風景を保存
道標にしよう そうだ
subtitles.english: let's make it our guidepost, yes.

subtitles.original: 傷ついた感情も
連れて行けたら
そっと響くカンパネラ
新しい未来を感じてる
怖くたって進むしかないでしょう保存
subtitles.english: Even if we are scared, we have to move forward, right?

subtitles.original: 遠くまで
もっと もっと
届けこの祈りよ光となれ
subtitles.english: Let this prayer reach, become the light!

subtitles.original: もっと もっと
少しずつでもいい
subtitles.english: Even if it's little by little,

subtitles.original: 私という答えを
もっと
もっと
夜空よ 教えて
私の証は輝けるのかな
subtitles.english: can my proof of existence shine?

subtitles.original: 見つけたい 見つけたいよ
subtitles.english: I want to find it, I want to find it.

subtitles.original: 誰かの決めたレベルは
苦しくなるだけ
ノイズも力に
subtitles.english: I will turn even the noise...

subtitles.original: 変えるよ 心に誓う
subtitles.english: ...into strength, I swear to my heart.

subtitles.original: 錆びついた運命の保存
歯車を回そう ほら
着飾った感情は
脱ぎ捨てるから
そっと紡ぐシンフォニア
叶えたい願いを信じてる保存
subtitles.english: I believe in the wishes I want to grant.

subtitles.original: 胸を張って歌うしかないでしょう
subtitles.english: We just have to sing with our heads held high,

subtitles.original: 全力で
もっと もっと
やがて希望の歌に変わる日まで
subtitles.english: Until the day it finally turns into a song of hope.

subtitles.original: もっと もっと
悩みながらでいい
subtitles.english: It's fine to worry as we go,

subtitles.original: 全てが宝物
いつの日かこの声を
subtitles.english: If one day, this voice...痕跡が残る保存

subtitles.original: 受け取ってくれたなら
この言葉を君に保存
subtitles.english: I give these words to you:

subtitles.original: もう大丈夫 一人じゃない
subtitles.english: "It's alright now, you are not alone."

subtitles.original: 強い想いを
繋ぐよ
一歩踏み出してみた
subtitles.english: I tried taking a step forward,

subtitles.original: 優しく世界は微笑む保存
高鳴る気持ちに身を任せて
さあ行こう

responses.thoughts:
**Subtitles for a Musical Journey**

Okay, so I've got this video with two songs, and the plan is to transcribe and time the lyrics for subtitles. The first song, "白線" (Hakusen) by Kazama Iroha, runs from 0:00 to 1:58. Right from the start, the Japanese lyrics flash on the screen – I'll start capturing those, line by line and in time. The opening lines, *“紡いでたら「一途」に変わったよ”*, that's, when I spun them together, they turned into devotion, with harmless words, I can't fully cover my own world. The singer’s voice, *“明日で呼ぶ声の持ち主は 他でもないこの心だった”*, the owner of the voice calling in tomorrow was none other than this heart of mine. I see the flow, even words that say "I can't see" – those are just words.  Grabbing and dropping – a metaphor, maybe?  Even if I fall, I stand up, and from the scenery I saw. “ロックユー！解き放って” (Rock you! Release it!) It's the theme!  Release it!  Then: “フォーユー！響きだして” (For you! Start echoing!) – the melody kicks in. The scenery is changing. To the sky that stretches far, far away, this first step is so tiny... but it’s going somewhere. A white line. Draw a white line. "どんな風に雨に消えない白線を描く" means how to draw it so that it will not fade in any wind or rain. I want to flap my wings higher and higher, connecting with yonder colors... then wait for me at the horizon. There are no more lies in my wishes, I love it here! Every world and every moment shines because love is there. Now, I just need to say what I feel: I love you! Okay, there’s an instrumental break, but I'll add the timing for that. A white line in the clear sky. Anxiety and expectation are ambivalent, but you already noticed. I can fly higher, higher, and higher!

Now, on to the second song, "未来カンパネラ" (Mirai Campanella), starting at 2:00. Those repeated "もっと... (More...)" phrases are a bit of a challenge. Okay, let's start with those repeating notes: *もっと... (More...)!*. Mirror, mirror, tell me, where is my proof of existence? I don't know, I don't know. The lyrics are on the screen. Even if I compare myself to others, it only makes me feel empty. That noise... takes away my tears like the roaring of the sea. Taking the cut-out scenery, let's make it our guidepost, yes. And can't bring along our hurt feelings? The Campanella gently echoes. I'm feeling a new future.  Even if we are scared, we have to move forward, right? To the far distance… Let this prayer reach, become the light! More, more. I'm taking this slowly... even the little bits help me find the answer that is myself. More! Then there’s a break. Night sky, tell me, can my proof of existence shine? I want to find it, I want to find it. Levels set by others only make me suffer. I will turn the noise... into strength, I swear to my heart. Let's turn the rusted gears of fate, look! I’ll cast aside my dressed-up emotions, because I will strip off my dressed-up emotions. The symphonia gently spun. I believe in the wishes I want to grant. We just have to sing with our heads held high, with all our might! More, more! Until the day it finally turns into a song of hope. It's fine to worry as we go, everything is a treasure. Then, more instrumentals. If one day, this voice is received by you, I give these words to you: It's alright now, you are not alone. These strong feelings... I will connect them. I tried taking a step forward, and the world gently smiles. Surrendering to this rising excitement, let's go! Done! All lyrics transcribed and properly timed.
